on_failed_enter_ui: Processing startup failure on UI thread
on_finished_enter_ui: Processing startup completion on UI thread
ui.confirmacion.archivo_ya_existe_info: Choose how to continue to avoid losing information.
ui.confirmacion.archivo_ya_existe_texto: A PDF with that name already exists in the selected folder.
ui.confirmacion.conflictos_detectados_me: There are requests with overlapping time slots. Remove/modify the conflict before confirming.
ui.confirmacion.deshacer_no_disponible_m: Synchronization is in progress. Undo is not available right now.
ui.confirmacion.sync_despues_pdf_pregunt: PDF generated. Do you want to sync with Google Sheets now?
ui.conflictos.duplicado_mensaje: There is already a matching record. ID {id} · Date {fecha} · From {desde} · To {hasta} · Full day {completo}.
ui.conflictos.solape_mensaje: The time range overlaps with an existing record. ID {id} · Date {fecha} · From {desde} · To {hasta} · Full day {completo}.
ui.sync.panel.confirmar_inicio_sync: Do you want to start synchronization with Google Sheets now?
ui.sync.panel.conflictos_pendientes: There are {cantidad} pending conflicts. Review them before syncing.
ui.sync.panel.falta_configuracion: Google Sheets is not configured or shared with the service account.
ui.sync.panel.no_hay_configuracion: Google Sheets is not configured. Open Options to configure it.
ui.sync.panel.sync_failed_inicio_ui: Sync failed: failed to start from UI
ui.sync.panel.sync_pantalla_no_disponibl: Synchronization is not available on this screen yet.

ui.personas.confirmar_cambios_mensaje: Do you confirm the changes? This will affect future calculations.
ui.personas.selecciona_delegada_eliminar: Select a valid delegate to delete.
ui.personas.eliminar_delegada_mensaje: Do you want to disable {nombre}? History will be kept.
